title: Junior Instructional Designer at NSDC Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at NSDC Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the NSDC Global Group family as a Instructional Designer in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NSDC Global Group:
NSDC Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC Global Group!
